description: A provider class for managing app settings, specifically theme mode and customer account ID, with persistence via SharedPreferences.

classes.name: AppSettingsProvider
classes.description: A ChangeNotifier that manages application settings such as theme mode and customer account ID, with load and save capabilities.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads the settings from persistent storage and updates internal state.

methods.name: setThemeMode
methods.description: Sets the theme mode, updates state and persists the value.

methods.name: setCustomerAccountId
methods.description: Sets the customer account ID, updates state and persists the value.

methods.name: _parseThemeMode
methods.description: Parses a string value into a ThemeMode enum.
